mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHALLENGE ( CHALLENGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, CATEGORY, TITLE, METRIC_TYPE, TARGET_VALUE, START_DATE, END_DATE ) VALUES ( nextval('SEQ_CHALLENGE'), #{userId}, #{threadId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{metricType}, #{targetValue}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT CHALLENGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, CATEGORY, TITLE, METRIC_TYPE, TARGET_VALUE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM CHALLENGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND END_DATE >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHALLENGE WHERE CHALLENGE_ID = #{challengeId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
